title: Great Boast Small Roast.
content:
Of flanks and chines of beef doth Gorrell boast
    He has at home; but who tastes boil'd or roast?
    Look in his brine-tub, and you shall find there
    Two stiff blue pigs'-feet and a sow's cleft ear.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Great Boast Small Roast."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
